no: Kelsey NG Male Human Sorcerer.Install Kelsey after Ascension and Solaufein mods.Install Kelsey before Keto, Nathaniel for BG2, and Yasraena.

conflicts.reason: Install Kelsey after Ascension. Kelsey has a dedicated Ascension compatibility component (#4) that adds interjections to Ascension's revised ToB finale. No evidence of dialogue blocking.
conflicts.theirComps: #0 Rewritten Final Chapter of Throne of Bhaal
conflicts.source: Kelsey tp2 comp 4 kelsey-asc.d patches FINBODH/FINMEL01 with APPEND; FATESP.d adds summon options. GitHub issue PPG/Kelsey#1 open since 2020 with no repro. Original entry copy-pasted from ImoenRomance conflict template, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both install identical bantergoose banter accelerator script. Kelsey #3 is DEPRECATED by its own authors. Use Banter Pack #1 instead and skip Kelsey #3. All other Kelsey components (#0, #1, #4) are fully compatible with Banter Pack.
conflicts.source: Kelsey tp2 DESIGNATED 3 marked DEPRECATED. Banter Pack has FORBID_FILE bantergoose.xxx check. Identical scripts, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both EXTEND_BOTTOM FINSOL01 29-32 and FATESP 6 with romance-specific guards. Additive ops, mutually exclusive conditions (only one romance active).
conflicts.source: Both use EXTEND_BOTTOM with independent romance globals; standard WeiDU additive pattern, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Chloe uses I_C_T on FINSOL01 27-32, Kelsey uses EXTEND_BOTTOM. Both additive, independent party checks.
conflicts.source: ChloeEET I_C_T and Kelsey EXTEND_BOTTOM are both additive WeiDU ops on FINSOL01, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Wheels REPLACE on FINSOL01 states 0-2/4/33 does not affect Kelsey (states 16/27-32). Both use EXTEND_BOTTOM on 27-32 safely. Install Kelsey before Wheels.
conflicts.source: Wheels REPLACE only states 0-2,4,33; Kelsey modifies 16,27-32; no overlap on replaced states, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both modify FINSOL01 states 27-32 but use additive EXTEND_BOTTOM/I_C_T with independent conditions. Install Longer Road before Kelsey.
conflicts.source: PPG/Kelsey tp2 uses EXTEND_BOTTOM/I_C_T on FINSOL01 27-32, LR uses same; additive ops, different guards, 2026-03

dependencies.reason: Kelsey needs Ascension to talk about it

sum: Adds Kelsey, a sorcerer, as a joinable BG2 NPC with one of the most extensive romance and dialogue mods ever made. Fully voiced with thousands of lines.
